records.question: Which characters have Pongo as the hero and were released exactly on 25-Jan-61?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT characters.movie_title FROM characters
WHERE characters.hero = 'Pongo' AND characters.release_date = '25-Jan-61'
records.pred_sql: SELECT movie_title FROM characters WHERE hero = 'Pongo' AND release_date = '25-Jan-61'

records.question: Which characters appear in movies directed by Gary Trousdale that have an MPAA rating of G?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT characters.movie_title FROM characters
JOIN director ON characters.movie_title = director.name
JOIN movies_total_gross ON characters.movie_title = movies_total_gross.movie_title
WHERE director.director = 'Gary Trousdale' AND movies_total_gross.mpaa_rating = 'G'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT characters.movie_title
FROM characters
JOIN director ON characters.movie_title = director.name
JOIN movies_total_gross ON characters.movie_title = movies_total_gross.movie_title
WHERE director.director = 'Gary Trousdale'
  AND movies_total_gross.MPAA_rating = 'G'
